title: Fix reduction methods for verilated types

features.name: queue reduction sum with struct field expression
features.description: Code should include a queue of user-defined struct type with a .sum reduction method using a with clause that computes a field-based expression returning a different type than the struct

features.name: queue reduction product on empty queue
features.description: Code should include an empty queue with a .product reduction method applied to it

features.name: queue reduction result used in arithmetic
features.description: Code should include a queue reduction result multiplied with another queue's product result
